warped_mosco.title: Kill a Warped Mosco (Alex's Mobs — spawns in Warped Forest biomes in the Nether)

subtitle.text: The Biological Civilization merged with life. This is what the Nether's life looks like now.

description: The Warped Mosco (Alex's Mobs) spawns in Warped Forest biomes
in the Nether — the mushroom-themed biome.
It drops the Hemolymph Sac — a critical ingredient
The Biological Civilization merged with life intentionally.
They were transformed without consent by what they studied.
The Corrupted Eye is their inheritance:
The Warped Forest is clearly distinct from the Crimson Forest.
Blue-green haze, warped fungi, Endermen presence.
